title: A single cell functions as a tissue-specific stem cell and the in vitro niche-forming cell.
author: Ghosh M Helm KM Smith RW Giordanengo MS Li B Shen H Reynolds SD
content: S-EPMC3175586 PMC3175586 A single cell functions as a tissue-specific stem cell and the in vitro niche-forming cell. Tissue-specific stem cell (TSC) behavior is determined by the stem cell niche. However, delineation of the TSC-niche interaction requires purification of both entities. We reasoned
